scene_title: Rede global de controle com olho carmesim no centro
narrative_beat: Linhas douradas sobre mapa escuro com olho central

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: colorful vivid aerial view of global control network with golden connecting lines over dark map with incandescent crimson eye at center combining medieval cartographic aesthetics with digital network diagram in vibrant foreground
subject.focal_point: the incandescent crimson eye at the center of the global golden network
subject.secondary: black and white desaturated world map with grey border lines in background

environment.location: global digital infrastructure aerial symbolic view

composition.foreground: network in vivid gold with crimson eye

style.post_processing: halation, crushed blacks, gold-crimson network saturation

mood.emotion: one hundred countries piloting CBDC — Revelation scale control approaching

symbolism.primary: the all-seeing eye as the convergence point of all digital systems
symbolism.secondary: medieval cartography merged with network diagram — the oldest fear meets the newest infrastructure

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
muted desaturated background palette warm saturated foreground only
